name: arm-reach
title: Reach a target with the end-effector
summary: Drive an N-DoF position-controlled arm to a commanded joint target, ramped under a per-tick velocity cap and a workspace clamp.
task: Reach the target with the end effector

policy.note: Baseline P-controller (deterministic, ships in-repo). For a trained policy, set kind:'lerobot' + ref:'hf://lerobot/<checkpoint>' — same manifest, contract, safety envelope, transport.

pre: q_target provided in normalized joint space, one value per actuated joint
robot homed — current q is known
invariants: no NaN or non-finite command ever reaches the driver
